title: Potato Vision
description: Potato Vision lets you use shaders with Iris at the same time as Distant Horizons.
body:
# Potato Vison
Potato Vison is based on the Fabulously Optimized modpack and allows you to use "Distant Horizon" with different compatible shaders.

## Main mod
Distant Horizons

Iris + Shaders

Do a Barrel Roll


## Include and compatible Shader : [Sources](https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e)

[Bliss](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader) by X0nk

[Bloop](https://modrinth.com/shader/bloop-shaders) by espen96

[BSL](https://bitslablab.com/bslshaders) by Capt. Tatsu

[Complementary](https://www.complementary.dev/) by Emin

[Daybreak](https://modrinth.com/shader/daybreak-shader) by Samuel Gerkin

[Hysteria](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders) by Nicole

[Mellow](https://codeberg.org/TheCMK/mellow-shader) by TheCMK

[Noble](https://github.com/BelmuTM/Noble) by Belmu

[Photon](https://github.com/sixthsurge/photon) by sixthsurge
